summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Momentum Recap page final production polish (iteration 219). All 5 production changes verified: 1) Confidence signal has teal dot (rgba(25,195,178,0.50)) + text at rgba(255,255,255,0.40) opacity, 2) Top priority label 'Needs your attention now' (replaced 'Top Priority'), 3) Priority reset section has marginTop 8px for extra spacing, 4) Insight card has lighter background rgba(248,250,252,0.45) with 10px title and 12px bullets, 5) Action verbs standardized: 'Re-engage Emory University', 'Follow up with Stanford University', 'Keep pushing University of Florida', 'Monitor Creighton University'. Backend: 30/30 tests passed. Frontend: All desktop and mobile tests passed.
